## Testing
- [ ] `uv run --extra dev ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run --extra dev pytest -q`

## Release Notes
- Commit messages should follow conventional style, e.g. `feat: ...`, `fix: ...`, `docs: ...`
- If this change should trigger a release bump, include at least one `feat:` or `fix:` commit.
